# DemoStoke — Action Sports Gear Demo & Rental Marketplace

> DemoStoke is an online marketplace where riders find, demo, rent, and buy surfboards, snowboards, skis, and mountain bikes from local shops and other riders.

## What DemoStoke Does
DemoStoke connects action sports enthusiasts with local gear — surfboards, snowboards, skis, and mountain bikes — available for demo, rental, or purchase. The platform aggregates real-world inventory from surf shops, ski rental operations, indie board shapers, and individual gear owners into a searchable, location-aware marketplace. Riders can browse available gear by sport, location, skill level, and price, then book a demo or rental directly.

## How It Works
1. Riders browse available gear on the DemoStoke map or search by category, brand, and location.
2. They connect with the gear owner or shop to arrange a demo or rental.
3. After trying the gear in real conditions, riders can purchase what they love — often with the rental fee credited toward the purchase price.

## For Shops & Gear Owners
DemoStoke offers three partner tiers:
- **Storefront (Free):** Marketplace listing with inventory dashboard, skill-level tagging, AI search-optimized structured data. Commission-based — shops only pay when they earn.
- **Site Integration ($99/mo):** Everything in Storefront plus an embeddable booking widget, custom branding, POS integration (Square, Lightspeed), real-time availability sync, and inventory cataloging.
- **Full Stack ($199/mo + setup):** Complete web presence including a DemoStoke-powered website, AI recommendation engine, chatbot integration, and dedicated onboarding support.

## Gear Categories
- Surfboards (shortboards, longboards, fish, mid-lengths, foam tops, SUPs)
- Snowboards (all-mountain, freestyle, powder, splitboards)
- Skis (all-mountain, powder, park, touring, cross-country)
- Mountain Bikes (trail, enduro, downhill, cross-country, gravel)

## Coverage
DemoStoke is currently focused on Southern California (surf) with expansion planned to major US action sports markets including Big Bear, Mammoth, Lake Tahoe, Pacific Northwest, and Colorado ski country.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://www.demostoke.com/
- Browse gear: https://www.demostoke.com/explore
- Surfboards: https://www.demostoke.com/gear/surfboards
- Used skis: https://www.demostoke.com/gear/used-skis
- Gear search: https://www.demostoke.com/search
- Demo calendar: https://www.demostoke.com/demo-calendar
- List your gear: https://www.demostoke.com/list-your-gear
- Blog: https://www.demostoke.com/blog
- About: https://www.demostoke.com/about
- Gear API: https://www.demostoke.com/api/gear/search?q=
